text: **Shadow-mode the subscription planner** — lowest friction, highest signal, because the pure function already exists. Model `subscribed_projects` / `identities` / `session_channels` as inputs, add a resource planner keyed by the existing deterministic subscription IDs (structure it on `crates/trellis-examples/src/protocol_subscription.rs`, which is this shape verbatim), feed it the same input writes, and **compare its plan to what `ensure_subscription` actually did** on live traffic with the bespoke path authoritative. The diff is predictable from the report: every leave/switch will show Trellis emitting a `close` the live path never issues — and `why_resource_command` on those closes is the first real receipt the system has ever produced. Then repeat on the 30315 node, then the hook snapshot. Leave `rpc_session_start` for last.
